data.description: President Petro of Colombia announces plans for subsidies and targeted “smart” tariffs.
resident Petro of Colombia states that not all imports from Ecuador will face 100% tariffs.
The Pingshan Fire Department reports a blaze at a multi-storey building in Pingshan District on April 14.
Pingshan Fire Rescue Department says the blaze is out and no casualties were reported.

data.title: Faraday Future to Participate in and Host Upcoming New York Investor and Industry Events, Highlighting Its Broader Vision for EAI Mobility and Robotics
data.description: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a leading California-based global intelligent electric mobility company, revealed that its Global President, Jerry Wang, is set to engage in multiple investor and industry events in New York this April. Alongside this, Faraday Future will be exhibiting its state-of-the-art electric vehicles and advanced robotics technologies at these events. Participants will be able to firsthand experience the innovative offerings presented by the company.

data.title: Ether investors see profit as ETH price targets $3K, with resistance at $2,800 slowing the rally.
data.description: Significant Ether investors have started making profits again, improving the possibility of a surge towards the $3,000 mark. However, there might be a hurdle at the $2,800 resistance level, which could slow down the recovery process.
